current: She rang an hour ago, Mr. Cula. She'll be there at quarter to.
proposed: She rang an hour ago, Dr. A. Cula. She'll be there at quarter to.
reason: address form: Asia is outer-circle and must use the full honorific 'Dr. A. Cula' (AGENTS.md §Address forms; voice_audit.py Rule B). The line is spoken by Asia (speaker='asia') and uses 'Mr. Cula', which is neither the canonical form nor a valid short-title address. The corresponding line in murrow_v2.json (L108) already uses 'Dr. A. Cula'.

current: Dr. A Cula, here to see Mr. Pig.
proposed: Dr. A. Cula, here to see Mr. Pig.
reason: canonical name: missing period after the middle initial. Canonical reference is 'Dr. A. Cula' (AGENTS.md §Cast — canonical names). This is the player's self-introduction option text under the 'dry' choice; Cula self-reference is exempt from bare-Cula rules but the canonical spelling still applies.
